The '''''Thunderhead''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] warship commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ssiew]].

==History==
The ''Thunderhead'' participated in a [[Battle of Doornik-319|feint over]] [[Doornik-319]] and fought in the [[Battle of N'zoth]].

Over [[Doornik-319]], New Republic warships appeared from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in an attempt to draw off [[Yevetha]]n defenders from [[N'zoth]] to reinforce Doornik-319. It was unknown if the [[Yevetha]]ns took the bait, but the ''Thunderhead'' was able to destroy an outbound Yevethan [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustship]] in the process.

The ''Thunderhead'' was later destroyed in the Battle of N'zoth by the Yevetha.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
